scope: portfolio, contribution plan, and contribution cycle user isolation
ContributionCycle composite database ownership constraint to contribution plan
duplicate cycle prevention by contributionPlanId and cycleMonth
DTO rejection of userId and unknown fields
cycle month, status, strategy, confirmedAmount, and notes validation
residualRisk: Approved with risk: confirmedAmount required for confirmed status is enforced through the API service and HTTP tests but not yet by a database CHECK, so PR-012/jobs must preserve or harden that invariant before direct writes; remaining magic-string signals are accepted as bounded DTO/route/enum mapping vocabulary for this PR.
